title: Slovakia — Application for a Citizen ID Card via Consular Office (Žiadosť o občiansky preukaz)
description:
The Slovak Republic's live HTML eForm "Žiadosť o občiansky preukaz" (Application for a Citizen ID Card), dataset `MZV.RequestIdentityCard` v2.3, published on the national eGovernment portal `slovensko.sk` and filed via a Slovak diplomatic or consular office abroad (zastupiteľský úrad SR) under the authority of the Ministerstvo zahraničných vecí a európskych záležitostí SR (Ministry of Foreign and European Affairs), a sibling channel to the domestic, Ministry of Interior-issued občiansky preukaz. Legal basis: zákon č. 224/2006 Z.z. o občianskych preukazoch (Act on Citizen Identity Cards) and zákon č. 122/2013 Z.z. o ochrane osobných údajov (Personal Data Protection Act). Opens Slovakia's National ID & Civic Documents vertical (1 of 6).

**Scope**: per the form's own printed notice ("UPOZORNENIE"), this consular channel accepts requests only from an applicant who has already held a citizen ID card issued after 2008-07-01 — a first-time domestic application must be filed within Slovakia in person and is out of scope for this document. This is therefore a renewal/replacement-via-embassy schema, not a first-issuance schema.

Models all 62 `fields[]` the live eForm exposes across its ten visible sections: the submitting contact's own information (which auto-copies into the applicant's identity fields unless a legal representative or authorized person is filing on the applicant's behalf), the applicant's personal/identity data, the applicant's legal capacity, the reason for the request, the applicant's previous ID card and any other currently valid Slovak identification document, the applicant's birth data and permanent Slovak address, an optional legal-representative (zákonný zástupca) section — genuinely gated by a client-side visibility toggle bound to its own checkbox, not an inferred condition — mirroring the applicant's own identity/birth/document/address fields, and a final data-accuracy confirmation. Also models 4 `documents[]` entries transcribed from the form's own 'Potrebné doklady' (required documents) notice.

This document is authored at `structural-reference` maturity: the live eForm's own client-side structure (labels, jQuery-validate rules, and codelist/visibility bindings) is fully transcribed, but no live submission through a consular office was attempted. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Slovak Republic, the Ministry of Foreign and European Affairs of the Slovak Republic, or any Slovak diplomatic or consular office.

authority.name: Zastupiteľský úrad Slovenskej republiky (Slovak diplomatic/consular office)

operatedBy.name: Ministerstvo zahraničných vecí a európskych záležitostí Slovenskej republiky (Ministry of Foreign and European Affairs of the Slovak Republic)
operatedBy.basis: The eForm dataset `MZV.RequestIdentityCard` is namespaced under `schemas.gov.sk/form/MZV.RequestIdentityCard/2.3` (the 'MZV' prefix denoting Ministerstvo zahraničných vecí) and is filed via a Slovak consular office abroad, per zákon č. 224/2006 Z.z. o občianskych preukazoch.

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-3019, child issue GOV-3014 (pre-scouted during GOV-3010). Independently re-fetched this cycle directly from www.slovensko.sk (HTTP 200, text/html, 110,026 bytes, sha256 dbae62ee009a542df4ff7ec8e86994a081313417624b40ff0f8824a2c1f883b2), not trusted from the scouting report as-is, and independently re-extracted the full field/label/validation structure from the raw HTML+embedded jQuery-validate rules block (not a PDF — a live interactive HTML eForm), confirming 91 fieldLabel elements total (including autocomplete-support hidden companions), 62 real fillable fields, and the client-side visibility/requiredness logic (deputy-section toggle, server-side codelist bindings, auto-copy-and-disable behavior). Opens Slovakia's National ID & Civic Documents vertical (1 of 6). See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing chain and every disclosed scoping decision.

fields.name: submissionOffice
fields.label: Odoslať na zastupiteľský úrad
fields.description: The Slovak diplomatic/consular office (zastupiteľský úrad SR) the request is submitted to. Populated from the platform's 'ZU' server-side codelist via a dynamic combobox widget (FormHelper.setupDynamicCombobox), not an embedded static list.
fields.sourceRef: Žiadosť o občiansky preukaz, 'Odoslať na zastupiteľský úrad'

fields.name: contactEmail
fields.label: E-mail
fields.description: Validated client-side against the platform's AddressRegEx pattern.

fields.name: contactPhoneCountryCode
fields.label: Typ telefónneho čísla
fields.description: Phone number's country calling-code prefix. Populated from the platform's 'PHONE_TYPE' server-side codelist via a dynamic combobox widget.

fields.name: contactPhoneNumber
fields.label: Telefónne číslo
fields.description: Validated client-side against the platform's FormattedNumberRegEx pattern.

fields.name: contactAddressCountry
fields.label: Štát
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'STATE' server-side codelist via a dynamic combobox widget; the Municipality field below is bound to this selection (FormHelper.bindMunicipalityToCountry).

fields.name: contactAddressMunicipality
fields.label: Obec
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'MUNICIPALITY' server-side codelist, cascading from contactAddressCountry.

fields.name: filledByRepresentativeOrAuthorizedPerson
fields.label: Označte v prípade, že formulár vypĺňa zákonný zástupca alebo splnomocnená osoba
fields.description: When unchecked (default), the applicant-identity fields applicantGivenName/applicantFamilyName below are auto-copied from contactGivenName/contactFamilyName and disabled client-side (FormHelper's CopyValuesAcrossForm), i.e. the contact person and the applicant are the same person. When checked, those two fields are cleared and become independently editable, since the person completing the form (a legal representative or authorized person) is not the applicant themself.
fields.sourceRef: Kontaktné informácie žiadateľa, 'Označte v prípade, že formulár vypĺňa zákonný zástupca alebo splnomocnená osoba'

fields.name: applicantTitlePrefix
fields.label: Titul pred menom
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'PREFIX' server-side codelist.

fields.name: applicantTitlePostfix
fields.label: Titul za menom
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'POSTFIX' server-side codelist.

fields.name: applicantGivenName
fields.label: Meno
fields.description: Auto-copied from contactGivenName and disabled unless filledByRepresentativeOrAuthorizedPerson is checked — see that field's description.

fields.name: applicantFamilyName
fields.label: Priezvisko
fields.description: Auto-copied from contactFamilyName and disabled unless filledByRepresentativeOrAuthorizedPerson is checked.

fields.name: applicantBirthFamilyName
fields.label: Rodné priezvisko
fields.description: Birth/maiden surname, when different from the current surname.

fields.name: applicantSex
fields.label: Pohlavie
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'SEX' server-side codelist via a dynamic combobox widget; the codelist's exact value set is not embedded in the form's static client-side markup.

fields.name: applicantNationality
fields.label: Štátna príslušnosť
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'NATIONALITY' server-side codelist via a dynamic combobox widget.

fields.name: applicantLegalCapacity
fields.label: Uveďte, či žiadateľ je právne spôsobilý
fields.description: Whether the applicant is legally capable (rendered as an Áno/Nie radio group on the form: Áno=true, Nie=false). If the application is filed by an authorized person, this states the information regarding the applicant on whose behalf they act.

fields.name: requestReason
fields.label: Dôvod žiadosti
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'REASON_OP' server-side codelist (e.g. expiry, loss, theft, damage, or personal-data change) via a dynamic combobox widget.

fields.name: previousIdentityCardNumber
fields.label: Číslo predchádzajúceho občianskeho preukazu
fields.description: Validated client-side against the platform's PreviousIdentytyCardNumberValidator.
fields.sourceRef: Informácie o žiadateľovi, 'Číslo predchádzajúceho občianskeho preukazu'

fields.name: previousIdentityCardIssuedDate
fields.label: Dátum vydania predchádzajúceho občianskeho preukazu
fields.description: Validated client-side to not be a future date (FormHelper.dateValidationNotInFuture).
fields.sourceRef: Informácie o žiadateľovi, 'Dátum vydania predchádzajúceho občianskeho preukazu'

fields.name: applicantBirthCountry
fields.label: Štát
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'STATE' server-side codelist; applicantBirthCounty and applicantBirthMunicipality are bound to this selection (FormHelper.bindMunicipalityToCountry).

fields.name: applicantBirthCounty
fields.label: Okres
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'COUNTY' server-side codelist, cascading from applicantBirthCountry.

fields.name: applicantBirthMunicipality
fields.label: Obec
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'MUNICIPALITY' server-side codelist, cascading from applicantBirthCountry.

fields.name: applicantBirthDate
fields.label: Dátum narodenia
fields.description: Validated client-side to not be a future date (FormHelper.dateValidationNotInFuture).

fields.name: applicantBirthNumber
fields.label: Rodné číslo
fields.description: Slovak birth number (rodné číslo), the national personal identifier. Validated client-side against the platform's PersonalNumberValidator (cross-checked against applicantBirthDate).

fields.name: applicantBirthNumberNotYetAssigned
fields.label: Označte v prípade, že nemáte ešte pridelené rodné číslo
fields.description: Check if the applicant does not yet have an assigned Slovak birth number.
fields.sourceRef: Dátum a miesto narodenia (žiadateľ), 'Označte v prípade, že nemáte ešte pridelené rodné číslo'

fields.name: applicantCurrentIdDocumentType
fields.label: Druh dokladu
fields.description: Type of the applicant's currently valid Slovak identification document (e.g. an existing citizen ID card or passport used to establish identity for this request). Populated from the platform's 'VALID_DOCUMENT' server-side codelist.

fields.name: applicantCurrentIdDocumentNumber
fields.label: Číslo dokladu
fields.description: Validated client-side against the platform's DocumentNumberValidator/DocumentNumberTypeValidator (cross-checked against applicantCurrentIdDocumentType).

fields.name: applicantAddressCountry
fields.label: Štát
fields.description: Restricted to Slovakia by the widget's own configuration (FormHelper.setSlovakiaOnlyCombobox), consistent with this section's own heading ('Adresa trvalého bydliska v SR' — permanent residence address in the Slovak Republic).

fields.name: applicantAddressMunicipality
fields.label: Obec
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'MUNICIPALITY' server-side codelist.

fields.name: applicantAddressPropertyRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Súpisné číslo
fields.sourceRef: Adresa trvalého bydliska v SR (žiadateľ), 'Súpisné číslo'

fields.name: applicantAddressBuildingNumber
fields.label: Orientačné číslo
fields.sourceRef: Adresa trvalého bydliska v SR (žiadateľ), 'Orientačné číslo'

fields.name: applicantAddressUnit
fields.label: Časť budovy
fields.sourceRef: Adresa trvalého bydliska v SR (žiadateľ), 'Časť budovy'

fields.name: deputyRepresentativeNeeded
fields.label: Je potrebný zákonný zástupca?
fields.description: Toggles visibility of the entire legal-representative (zákonný zástupca) section below, client-side (SwitchSections binds this checkbox to the section's container, #layoutRow123) — completed when the applicant is a minor or otherwise requires a legal representative.

fields.name: deputySex
fields.label: Pohlavie
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'SEX' server-side codelist.

fields.name: deputyNationality
fields.label: Štátna príslušnosť
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'NATIONALITY' server-side codelist.

fields.name: deputyBirthCountry
fields.label: Štát
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'STATE' server-side codelist; deputyBirthCounty/deputyBirthMunicipality are bound to this selection.

fields.name: deputyBirthCounty
fields.label: Okres
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'COUNTY' server-side codelist, cascading from deputyBirthCountry.

fields.name: deputyBirthMunicipality
fields.label: Obec
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'MUNICIPALITY' server-side codelist, cascading from deputyBirthCountry.

fields.name: deputyBirthDate
fields.label: Dátum narodenia
fields.description: Validated client-side against both FormHelper.validateAge (the legal representative must be an adult) and dateValidationNotInFuture.
fields.sourceRef: Dátum a miesto narodenia (zákonný zástupca), 'Dátum narodenia'

fields.name: deputyBirthNumber
fields.label: Rodné číslo
fields.description: Validated client-side against the platform's PersonalNumberValidatorDeputy (cross-checked against deputyBirthDate).
fields.sourceRef: Dátum a miesto narodenia (zákonný zástupca), 'Rodné číslo'

fields.name: deputyBirthNumberNotYetAssigned
fields.label: Označte v prípade, že zákonný zástupca nemá rodné číslo
fields.description: Check if the legal representative does not have a Slovak birth number.
fields.sourceRef: Dátum a miesto narodenia (zákonný zástupca), 'Označte v prípade, že zákonný zástupca nemá rodné číslo'

fields.name: deputyCurrentIdDocumentType
fields.label: Druh dokladu
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'VALID_DOCUMENT' server-side codelist.
fields.sourceRef: Platný identifikačný doklad SR (zákonný zástupca), 'Druh dokladu'

fields.name: deputyCurrentIdDocumentNumber
fields.label: Číslo dokladu
fields.description: Validated client-side against the platform's DeputyDocumentNumberValidator/DeputyDocumentNumberTypeValidator.
fields.sourceRef: Platný identifikačný doklad SR (zákonný zástupca), 'Číslo dokladu'

fields.name: deputyAddressCountry
fields.label: Štát
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'STATE' server-side codelist; deputyAddressMunicipality is bound to this selection.

fields.name: deputyAddressMunicipality
fields.label: Obec
fields.description: Populated from the platform's 'MUNICIPALITY' server-side codelist, cascading from deputyAddressCountry.

fields.name: dataAccuracyConfirmation
fields.label: Potvrdzujem správnosť vyplnených údajov
fields.description: Final sworn confirmation of the accuracy of the entered data, required before submission.
fields.sourceRef: Potvrdenie vyplnených údajov, 'Potvrdzujem správnosť vyplnených údajov'

documents.label: Platný doklad totožnosti (cestovný pas alebo občiansky preukaz)
documents.issuingAuthority: Ministerstvo vnútra Slovenskej republiky / cudzí štát (passport-issuing authority)
documents.sourceRef: Potrebné doklady, 'platný doklad totožnosti (cestovný pas alebo občiansky preukaz)'

documents.label: Doklad o strate/odcudzení doterajšieho občianskeho preukazu
documents.issuingAuthority: Policajný zbor (police report) or applicant's own declaration
documents.sourceRef: Potrebné doklady, 'doklad o strate/odcudzení doterajšieho občianskeho preukazu'

documents.label: Matričný doklad o zmene mena/priezviska vydaný v Slovenskej republike
documents.sourceRef: Potrebné doklady, 'matričný doklad o zmene mena/priezviska vydaný v Slovenskej republike'
